title: (Bearish Signal) GBT, Stochastic Oscillator left the overbought zone on March 18, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that GBT's price trend could be reversing, and it may be an opportunity to sell the stock or take a defensive position. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 68 similar cases where GBT's stochastic oscillator exited the overbought zone, and 58 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 85%. Downtrend. During the week of 03/11/21 - 03/18/21, the stock fell -0.47%.

https://preview.redd.it/839uwpm1f0o61.png?width=1418&format=png&auto=webp&s=fe56eed18595d9d129b5e6eb1dc1e8020c53cbe1

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 58 of 68 cases where GBT's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 85%.

GBT moved below its 50-day Moving Average on February 25, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

The 50-day Moving Average for GBT moved below the 200-day moving average on August 18, 2020. This could be a long-term bearish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an downward trend.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where GBT declined for three days, the price rose further, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

The Aroon Indicator for GBT entered a downward trend on March 16, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10032139-global-blood-therapeutics-s-gbt-42-7-stochastic-oscillator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-march-18-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
